name: Observation and state snapshot
role: Build the decision-cycle state from observations and operations logs
notes: Defines what the controller can observe each cycle

name: Rolling parameter calibration
role: Online/rolling state-parameter estimation for the forecast model

name: Probabilistic inflow forecasting
role: Generate point and/or ensemble inflow forecasts for the dispatch horizon
notes: Forecast module choice should not dominate the paper's novelty claim

name: Uncertainty-to-scenario generator
role: Convert forecast uncertainty into dispatch scenarios with weights
notes: Keep minimal unless it becomes a key innovation

name: Dispatch optimizer (scenario MPC)
role: Optimize releases given scenarios and constraints
output_format: release schedule for the next cycle
notes: Uncertainty-aware dispatch is required for claim C3

name: Implementation feedback and loop orchestrator
role: Close the loop by updating the next-cycle inputs from realized implementation outcomes
input_format: realized inflow; realized release; constraint violations
